commands.review_summary:
The PR changes session-history HTTP and SSE authorization to use the OpenAI-compatible resolver and adds bearer HTTP/SSE regression coverage plus a revocation mock update.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main clearly routes /sessions/:key/history and its SSE reauth through resolveTrustedHttpOperatorScopes, so shared-secret bearer requests without trusted declared scopes fail chat.history authorization before reading history.
commands.review_followup: External PR needs stronger contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the bearer data-access boundary; this is not a ClawSweeper repair job.
